title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 380.651 - Provisions inapplicable to mutual companies
text:
380.651.  Provisions inapplicable to mutual companies. — Nothing contained in this section and sections 375.1250 to 375.1275, sections 375.1280 to 375.1295, sections 376.1000 to 376.1045, and sections 376.1075 to 376.1095 shall apply to an insurance company formed and existing under the provisions of this chapter, dealing with county, town and farmers' mutual property insurance companies.
(L. 1993 H.B. 709 & 21)
